name: DANDYS WORLD rpg! (WIP, EARLY ACCESS)
description:
WIP, EARLY ACCESS

Includes almost all toons(no event toons except cocoa, bobbette and flyte but i'm planning to add the rest)

You can pretty much do anything in this bot, just please don't get freaky with toodles, groudy, coal, or pebble..

Please publish your chats! I'd love to see em.

Takes place after the twisteds and stuff started happening.

There is currently only a make your own scenario.But I will make a regular scenario soon
